quality.rationale: 完整协变推导链+冻结磁通定理+天体物理流体背景

origin.question: Problem 4.23. Find the equation for the convective time rate of change of a magnetic field which is "frozen in" a perfectly conducting fluid, in terms of the expansion, shear, and rotation of the fluid. (See Problem 5.18 for definitions of these quantities.)
origin.answer: $D B^{\\alpha} / d \\tau = u^{\\alpha} a_{\\beta} B^{\\beta} + \\left(\\omega^{\\alpha \\beta} + \\sigma^{\\alpha \\beta}\\right) B_{\\beta} - \\frac {2} {3} \\theta P^{\\alpha}_{\\beta} B^{\\beta}$
